signals.headline: Powell Warns on U
signals.raw:
Powell Warns on U.S. Debt Sustainability | YES | HIGH confidence**
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell issued a warning that the current fiscal path—where Congress spends more than the U.S. takes in—is "not sustainable" and stated "It will not end well if we don't do something fairly soon."[1] This represents a significant policy statement on fiscal concerns.
